zh.Arnecliff-in-Cleveland, West Riding, Yor: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Fauconberg於大約1323年出生在英國越可爾阿可利福時，她的父親John Fauconberg34歲，母親Eve Bulmer30歲。她於大約1344年與William de Colville在英國越可爾阿可利福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年享年59歲。

zh-hans.Arnecliff-in-Cleveland, West Riding, Yor: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Fauconberg于大约1323年出生在英国越可爾阿可利福时，她的父亲John Fauconberg34岁，母亲Eve Bulmer30岁。她于大约1344年与William de Colville在英国越可爾阿可利福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Fauconberg was born about 1323, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Fauconberg, was 34 and her mother, Eve Bulmer, was 30. She married William de Colville about 1344, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1381, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Fauconberg est née environ 1323, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Fauconberg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eve Bulmer, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William de Colville environ 1344, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1381, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Fauconberg um 1323 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fauconberg 34 und ihre Mutter Eve Bulmer 30. Sie hat um 1344 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England William de Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1381 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fauconberg è nata il circa 1323 nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Fauconberg, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Eve Bulmer, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William de Colville circa 1344, nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1381, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Arnecliff-in-Cleveland, West Riding, Yor: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランド
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fauconbergが約1323年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフで生まれた時，父John Fauconbergは34歳，母Eve Bulmerは30歳であった。約1344年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフでWilliam de Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fauconberg(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fauconberg(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve Bulmer(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1344년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 William de Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fauconberg nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fauconberg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eve Bulmer, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Colville aproximadamente 1344, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1381, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Fauconberg родилась около 1323 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Fauconberg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eve Bulmer, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Colville около 1344 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1381 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Fauconberg nació aproximadamente 1323, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fauconberg, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eve Bulmer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con William de Colville aproximadamente 1344, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1381, a la edad de 59 años.
